headline: Example Lab ships Example Model 5
what_happened: Example Lab announced Example Model 5, a new frontier model with a longer context window and improved coding performance, in a post on its own blog.
why_it_matters: It gives developers a cheaper option for long-document tasks and raises the bar other labs will be compared against.
one_liner: Example Lab's newest model reads more at once and writes better code.

citations.quote: Example Model 5 is our most capable model yet.
The release expands the context window significantly.
